tips.title: How does the division work?
tips.algorithm: We use a serpentine draft algorithm that balances teams by quality (weight 3.0), position (1.5), and height (1.0).
tips.tallCenters: Tall centers with similar quality are automatically placed on different teams.
tips.modes: In 4-team mode, 2 groups (Red/Black) are created with 2 subteams each — the score carries over between games.
tips.adjust: After the division, you can manually adjust by swapping players between teams.

errors.maxSelected: Maximum of {max} players. Only the first {max} were selected.
errors.minPlayers: Select at least {min} players for {teams} teams.
